text:
Kochi Metro Rail Limited
# 3.0 BACKGROUND
Kochi Metro Rail Limited (KMRL) invites expression of interest from eligible
consultants to work as Independent Construction Quality Monitoring Agency for the
work, "Independent Construction Quality Monitoring Agency for the work,
"Improvement of Various City Roads by Kochi Metro Rail Limited in connection
with Kochi Metro Traffic Diversion". KMRL is engaged in implementing the metro
rail project in Kochi. As part of the project KMRL is taking up strengthening and
improvement of 15 km of roads in Kochi. The selected agency shall carry out quality
monitoring of the strengthening and improvement of roads undertaken by KMRL. The
consulting services include engaging an Independent Construction Quality Monitoring
Agency to monitor that the quality of goods and works procured and executed are of
high standards and of the assured quality resulting in creation of sustainable assets. The
consultants shall ensure that the quality assurance of materials is properly documented.
# 4.0 QUALIFICATION CRITERIA:
Interested firms shall provide information demonstrating that they have the required
qualifications and relevant experience to perform the Services. The short listing criteria
are:
## 1. The general and overall experience of the firm including the number of years
of operation, Indicating the number of years in planning, designing contract
management, construction supervision quality assurance of road works
consultancy.
## 2. Experience of working in a similar geographic region.
## 3. Key personnel required
The organization shall be able to demonstrate to have
key expert as Project Manager in the areas of Highway engineering with more
than 15 years in civil construction (after graduation in civil Engineering)
including at least five years of experience in Construction Quality monitoring.
## 4. An average annual turnover of INR 50 lakhs for the past three years (2011-
12,2012-13 & 2013-14);
## 5. Firms should have minimum of 3 year Experience in Highway engineering as
Quality Monitoring consultants or enlisted as State PWD or NHAI
consultants.
## 6. List of key positions whose CV and experience would be evaluated
Minimum qualification for personnel to be employed for construction quality
monitoring of the works is given in Table below:
3 | P age

Kochi Metro Rail Limited
No Description Qualification & experience Number of posts
1 Team Leader Graduate in Civil Engineering 1
with 15 years of experience out
of which at least five years of
experience in road sector.
2 Quality Engineer Graduate in Civil Engineering 1
with 15 years experience out of
which at least five years of
experience in execution and
quality monitoring of Highway
projects.
3 Junior Engineer Diploma in Civil Engineering 2
# 5.0 TERMS OF REFERENCE
5.1 For Selection of Independent Construction Quality Monitoring Consultancy for
Kochi Metro rail Ltd for the work, "Improvement of Various City Roads by Kochi
Metro Rail Limited in connection with Kochi Metro Traffic Diversion".
1.1 KMRL is engaged in implementing a metro rail project in Kochi. As
part of the project, KMRL is taking up strengthening and improvement
of 15 km of roads. The primary objective of the project is strengthening
and improving about 15 km of roads as allied work of construction of
metro rail in Kochi. The project will include formation, diversion,
strengthening, construction of sub-grade/sub-base/base course and
wearing course etc.
1.2 Description of Components of the projects:
The project includes strengthening and Improving the existing road
with profile correction using WMM & BM, base course with DBM and
wearing course with BC and other appurtenance works.
1.3 Project duration
The consultancy is intended for the execution period and is
approximately four months. The consultancy work is valid till the
completion of the main work at the rate in the agreement.
1.4 Method of Implementation of the project works:
The works will be arranged through contracting agencies by inviting
tenders. The day to day supervision will be handled by the KMRL and
4 | P age

rows: Graduate in Civil Engineering with 15 years of experience out of which at least five years of experience in road sector.
Graduate in Civil Engineering with 15 years experience out of which at least five years of experience in execution and quality monitoring of Highway projects.

text:
Kochi Metro Rail Limited
the quality monitoring consultants. The duty of the quality monitoring
consultants will be daily monitoring of the works independently.
1.5 Various activities involved in the implementation of the project are:
 Formation/improvement and strengthening of the selected
roads and other works as detailed in the tender schedule of
work KMRL/PRJ/RW-CONTRACT/179/2014/TEN 01.
This will be carried out by the contractor under the
supervision of KMRL and Independent Construction
Quality Monitoring Agency.
 Ensure quality of construction, goods and materials during
implementation. – This is to be carried out by the
Independent Construction Quality Monitoring Agency.
# 6.0 SCOPE OF WORK:
The Scope of Consultant's works includes but not limited to
# 1) Mobilize staff and other requirements for undertaking visits to the
construction sites of strengthening and improvement of roads for Kochi
Metro Rail.
# 2) Interaction with contractors and officials of KMRL for studying
the details of road improvement works being undertaken by KMRL.
# 3) Inspection of works and materials (or as specified in the terms)
to ascertain that the works are implemented as per IRC/ MORTH
specifications (or any other specifications mentioned in the contract).
# 4) Inspection of the works to ensure that the project works, goods
and services procured by the contractors for implementation of the project
are in conformity with the required specifications and quality
# 5) Checking at random whether materials procured are of the desired
quality and specification.
# 6) Carrying out checks at frequent intervals to ensure compliance
with the standard specifications in respect of the quality of
construction of project works and the quality of construction
materials used in the project works as described in the quality
Manual. The consultant may if deemed necessary collect samples
of materials and arrange for testing at approved laboratories.
5 | P age

Kochi Metro Rail Limited
# 7) Suggest remedial measures or improvements in the quality of
works and quality of supervision.
# 8) Witness tests or execution of specific items if required at the time of
execution/conducting tests
# 9) Providing technical expertise if required for certain specialized
items of works.
## 10) Routine quality control checks and supervision including attending
to factory inspection of materials.
## 11) Occasionally KMRL may entrust any particular check of material or
quality of construction, which shall be carried out by the
consultant. .
## 12) Prepare a Quality assurance Manual within one week after
execution of agreement. The quality assurance manual shall
specify Format and Periodicity of tests and inspection at each stage
of works to be carried out by the Independent Construction
Quality Monitoring Agency and KMRL. The quality assurance
manual as well as the report format shall be in accordance
with the quality control guidelines and specifications of MORTH
specifications for road and bridge works.
13). The quality monitors shall inspect each road work and conduct
necessary tests at every stage as specified in MORTH
specifications.
# 7.0 REPORTING
7.1 The consultants shall inspect the work site daily and provide guidance to
them to rectify defects if any. The consultants shall provide activity related
comments for rectification/improvements on the same day or next day of field
visit. Such activity reports of details and remedial measures given and done shall
be given to the client weekly. On subsequent visits, compliance relating to the
rectifications suggested during the previous visits shall be reviewed, noted and
documented and submitted to client.
7.2 In addition to the above periodical reports, the consultant shall inform the
client regarding any serious irregularity or serious lapse on the part of contractor
in the implementation requiring immediate attention then and there so that
remedial measures can be taken.
7.3 The reports shall be submitted to
6 | P age

Kochi Metro Rail Limited
## 1. Original copy to General Manager Civil, KMRL
## 2. 2nd copy to the Engineer in Charge
# 8.0 PERFORMANCE GUARENTEE
8.1 The successful bidder shall give a performance guarantee of 5% of the quoted
amount as Bank Guarantee valid till 45 days from the date of completion.
# 9.0 FINANCIAL QUOTE
9.1 The financial quote to be submitted duly in Format attached in Annexure B.
9.2 Rate to be quoted for approx. 15.00 km with required personnel as specified
in the document.
9.3 The contract will be awarded to the bidder whose bid has been determined
and found to be eligible and to be substantially responsive to the bid
document and who has offered the lowest evaluated Quote, provided further
that the bidder has the capability and resources to effectively carry out the
contract works.
9.4 Overall total amount is considered for evaluation of the bid.
9.5 The rates given for works should be inclusive of all overheads and taxes. No
office space or any travel arrangements will be made by KMRL.
# 10.00 TERMS AND CONDITIONS FOR SUBMISSION OF BIDS
10.1 Bids are to be submitted in single cover, properly sealed and addressed to
General Manager (Civil),Kochi Metro Rail Limited, 8th Floor, Revenue
Tower, Park Avneue, Cochin 11 before the last date and time detailed in
the NIT.
10.2 The tender processing fee of Rs .3000/- and EMD of Rs.45,000/- shall be
remitted in form of DD in favour of Kochi Metro Rail Limited payable at
Kochi.
10.3 Bid includes this tender document duly signed by the bidder with the
Company profile (Annexure A) and financial quote(annexure B) and the
relevant documents and experience certificates.
10.3 Bidders are requested to submit the copies of the relevant experience
certificates and registration certificates of the firm duly attested by a
Gazette Officer of the rank not less than Executive Engineer.
7 | P age

Kochi Metro Rail Limited
10.4 Certificates/documents for the average turnover of the firm for the last
three years should be duly authorized by the Charted Accountant of the
firm.
10.5 The company/firm should submit its profile, as detailed along with self-
attested copies of documentary proof.in the format as shown in Annexure
A.
10.6 KMRL reserves the right to modify/cancel the bid without assigning any
reasons.
10.7 If the document submission date, happens to be a holiday or not working
due to any valid reasons, the tender opening process/submission of
documents will be done on the next working day, the same time and
place.
10.8 Further details, if require, can be held from the Mr. S. Chandra Babu,
General Manager (Civil), Kochi Metro Rail Limited.
# 11.0 PAYMENT TERMS AND CONDITIONS
11.1 Payment will be done only on monthly basis duly certified by Engineer in
Charge. The bill will be proportionally based on the kilometer of work
completed by the main contractor .The payment bill to be supported by tour
diary of the personnel engaged duly certified by Site in Charge. Payment will
be credited to the designated bank account of the consultant electronically.
11.2 Absence of any personnel during execution of work will be subjected to a
penalty of Rs. 5000/- day
11.3 Non submission of report on time will be subjected to a penalty of Rs.
1000 per day.

Kochi Metro Rail Limited
